ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "trim" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle (e.g., Base, Four, Touring) */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle type */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission type */,
  "drivetrain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drivetrain configuration */,
  "fuel_efficiency_city" TEXT /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle in the city (in miles per gallon) */,
  "fuel_efficiency_highway" TEXT /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle on the highway (in miles per gallon) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Base price of the vehicle */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drivetrain_id FOREIGN KEY ("drivetrain_id") REFERENCES drivetrains ("drivetrain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make (e.g., Toyota, Ford, Honda) */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the vehicle make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model (e.g., Prius, Civic, Corolla) */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "model_year_range" TEXT /* Range of years for which the model was produced */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Generation of the model (e.g., first generation, second generation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., GAS, Diesel, Hybrid) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "engine_capacity" TEXT /* Engine capacity in liters */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine in lb-ft */,
  "engine_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the engine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_engines" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine */,
  "horsepower_range" TEXT /* Horsepower range for the vehicle-engine combination */,
  "torque_range" TEXT /* Torque range for the vehicle-engine combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, customer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "favorite_vehicles" TEXT /* IDs of the vehicles favorited by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual, semi-automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivetrains" (
  "drivetrain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drivetrain configuration */,
  "drivetrain_type" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., front-wheel drive, all-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drivetrain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV, truck) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_features" (
  "safety_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety feature */,
  "safety_feature" TEXT /* Type of safety feature (e.g., airbags, ABS, ESC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_safety_features" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "safety_feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "safety_feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_violations" (
  "report_violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report violation */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of violation (e.g., data inconsistency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_violations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
